title: Add Estimated Reading Time to Articles
description: Calculate and display estimated reading time based on word count.
requirements: Display 'X min read' in post meta
hints: Count words by splitting text on spaces
solution: Get textContent of article, count words, divide by 200, display result in the post-meta area.

title: Build a Search Bar with Live Filtering
description: Add a search bar that filters blog posts in real-time by title or excerpt.
requirements: Search input in header or sidebar
Filter posts by title match as user types
hints: Filter array of post titles with includes()
solution: Input listener filters .post-card elements. Show/hide based on title textContent.includes(query). Use display: none/show.

title: Create an Article Reading Progress Bar
description: A fixed progress bar at the top of the page that fills as the user scrolls through an article.
requirements: Progress bar fixed at top of viewport
Width represents scroll percentage of article
Zero height when at top, 4px at any scroll
hints: Use position: fixed on the bar
solution: Create a thin fixed div. On scroll, calculate (window.scrollY / (documentHeight - windowHeight)) * 100 and set its width percentage.
